title: ICAI Announces One-Time Relaxation for Missed UDINs till April 30, 2026
content:
# ICAI Announces One-Time Relaxation for Missed UDINs till April 30, 2026

Ek important update hai for all Chartered Accountants! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) has announced a one-time relaxation for generating Unique Document Identification Numbers (UDINs) that might have been missed.

This is a crucial opportunity for members who faced challenges during the transition to the new UDIN portal.

*   **What is it?** A one-time relaxation window to generate missed UDINs.
*   **Documents Covered:** This relaxation specifically applies to documents and reports signed between October 22, 2025, and November 22, 2025.
*   **New Due Date:** Members can generate these pending UDINs from April 1, 2026, up to April 30, 2026 (both days inclusive).
*   **Why this relaxation?** It's to address the difficulties members encountered in generating UDINs during the period of transition to the new UDIN portal.
*   **Important Note:** For all documents/reports not falling within the specified period (October 22, 2025, to November 22, 2025), the existing rule of generating UDIN within 60 days from the date of signing continues to apply.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=14183)

*Published on: 5 April 2026*
